category_sources: source_facts.description says libraries for security-enabled client and server applications; official Firefox Source Docs title is Network Security Services (NSS).
display_name_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs page title is Network Security Services (NSS); source_facts.name is nss.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official NSS docs index; official build page documents source code checkout and build process.
repo_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs build page says NSS uses Mercurial for source control and gives hg clone https://hg.mozilla.org/projects/nss.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official NSS docs identify security libraries for client/server applications, TLS/SSL, and related crypto tooling.
